data.name: ICP — AI-native mid-market v1
data.description: AI-native companies, 50–500 employees, post Series A. Workload type one of: training, inference, agentic. Predicted annual spend > $50k.

data.name: ICP — AI-native mid-market v2
data.description: AI-native companies, 50–500 employees, post Series B. Workload type one of: training, inference, agentic. Predicted annual spend > $100k. Excludes pre-revenue.

data.name: Workload classifier prompt v1
data.description: Initial workload classification prompt. Output: {workload: training|inference|agentic, confidence: 0..1, rationale}.

data.name: Workload classifier prompt v2
data.description: Adds explicit bottoms-up spend estimation step. Output: {workload, predicted_annual_spend_usd, confidence, rationale, basis_urls}.

data.name: Screening — Do Not Sell list
data.description: Excludes sanctioned entities, direct competitors, and accounts on the customer's stated do-not-sell list.

data.name: Signal priority scoring v1
data.description: Ranks in-ICP prospect accounts by recent signal strength, champion movement, predicted spend, and source reliability. Output: intent_score 0..1 plus rationale.
Foundation model lab. Claude family of models. Major training and inference workloads.
Legal AI platform. Used by AmLaw 100 firms. Outcome-priced engagements.
AI-native answer engine. Enterprise tier launching 2026. Major inference workloads.
Devin — autonomous AI software engineer. Series D announced 2026-03.
Cursor IDE — AI-native code editor. $100M+ ARR.
AI-native customer support. Series A 2024, growing fast but pre-Series B.
AI agents for customer experience. Outcome-based pricing. Bret Taylor + Clay Bavor.
Healthcare-focused safety-tuned LLMs for clinical staffing.
Generative music AI. Massive consumer scale, growing enterprise interest.
Consumer team and most leadership absorbed by Microsoft 2024. Remaining commercial entity wound down.
Enterprise AI buyer at scale. AI Everywhere mandate from CEO. Parent of GitHub, OpenAI partner.
Microsoft subsidiary. Copilot + enterprise dev platform. Active CDP evaluation for developer growth.
GPU cloud + open-model hosting. Co-sell partner for AI-native customers.

data.name: Q2 2026 Target Accounts
data.definition: Tier 1 or Tier 2 prospects matching ICP v2, with strong signals in last 60 days.

data.name: AI-native mid-market watchlist
data.definition: All AI-native companies in segment=mid_market or startup, regardless of stage.

data.name: Expansion candidates
data.definition: Customers with ARR growth >20% YoY and engagement_score > 0.6.

data.name: Anthropic — platform expansion 2026
data.description: Renewal + expansion across new training and inference pipelines.

data.name: Cognition — initial platform for Devin scaling
data.description: Net new. Devin scaling infrastructure as Series D-funded growth accelerates.

data.name: Cursor — developer growth analytics
data.description: Net new. Cursor wants CDP-style customer data infra for $100M+ ARR scale.

data.name: Decagon — pre-revenue evaluation
data.description: Net new. Series A but pre-revenue — proceed cautiously.

data.name: GitHub — enterprise developer analytics
data.description: Enterprise pilot for GitHub developer growth. Parent-level (Microsoft) approval required.

data.name: Inflection AI — renewal
data.description: Lost renewal. Most team absorbed by Microsoft, contract wound down.

data.name: Harvey — customer success automation 2025
data.description: Closed-won customer success automation pilot. Nora was the internal champion before moving to Sierra.

data.name: Anthropic launches Claude Mythos Preview
data.brief: Major model release. Drives inference + safety eval infra investment.
data.description: Anthropic published Claude Mythos Preview April 7 2026 with a step-change in autonomous capability. Triggers significant inference scaling at the lab.

data.name: Cognition: $300M Series D at $5B valuation
data.brief: Devin maker raises Series D. Massive infra scaling implied.
data.description: Cognition Labs announced $300M Series D at $5B valuation in March 2026 to scale Devin commercially.

data.name: Maya Chen joins Cognition as VP Engineering
data.brief: Former Anthropic Platform Director. Major hiring + leadership-change signal.
data.description: Maya Chen announced her move from Anthropic to Cognition as VP Engineering effective April 1 2026. Job-change signal for Maya, leadership-change signal for Cognition.

data.name: Cursor crosses $100M ARR
data.brief: AI code editor hits milestone. Drives infra and analytics needs.
data.description: Anysphere (Cursor) publicly disclosed crossing $100M ARR in Q1 2026.

data.name: Perplexity Enterprise GA
data.brief: Enterprise tier launches with major customer wins.
data.description: Perplexity made its Enterprise tier generally available in February 2026.

data.name: Microsoft AI Everywhere mandate
data.brief: CEO statement: every product line ships AI features by year-end. Triggers subsidiary-level evaluations.
data.description: Satya Nadella publicly committed to AI-in-every-product-line on the Q2 FY26 earnings call.

data.name: GitHub opens 8 AI/ML roles
data.brief: VP Eng publicly hiring. Public LinkedIn posts.
data.description: Eight AI/ML engineer openings posted in March 2026.

data.name: Sierra funding context refreshed
data.brief: Parallel enrichment found fresh funding and growth context; route for score review.
data.description: Illustrative enrichment output: Sierra has a strong financing and enterprise adoption profile, making it a high-priority account for signal-based outbound.

data.name: Nora Patel joins Sierra from Harvey
data.brief: Former Harvey champion moved into a VP Customer Success role at Sierra.
data.description: Illustrative job-change signal: Nora Patel, a prior closed-won champion at Harvey, joined Sierra as VP Customer Success.

data.name: Inflection commercial team wound down
data.brief: Most leadership absorbed by Microsoft in 2024; commercial entity now winding down.
data.description: Inflection AI's remaining commercial business announced wind-down following the broader team transition to Microsoft.

data.name: Together AI joins partner network
data.description: Together AI signed a co-sell GTM partnership.

data.name: Harvey expands top-10 law-firm footprint
data.brief: Named enterprise law-firm win. Validates legal vertical.
data.description: Harvey announced an additional AmLaw 10 firm deployment in March 2026.

data.rationale: Series D ($300M) + VP Eng hire from Anthropic + Devin scaling. Workload: agentic inference. Predicted annual spend: $220k.
Series A but pre-revenue. AI-native customer support — would benefit from CDP but unclear timeline. Workload: agentic. Predicted spend: $85k.
ICP v2 requires post Series B. Decagon is Series A. Reroute to nurture cadence; revisit after next round.
Technical evaluation kicked off following AI Everywhere mandate from Microsoft parent. Advance to technical_eval.
Commercial entity winding down following team absorption by Microsoft. Move to do_not_sell.
Initial classification with prompt v1 (pre-Series D). Insufficient context — superseded by April re-run with prompt v2.
In-ICP prospect with funding trigger, champion movement, high predicted spend, and recent engagement. Intent score: 0.92.
Enterprise ICP fit with parent-level AI mandate, hiring signal, and largest predicted spend. Intent score: 0.88.
AI-native devtools prospect with growth signal and Modal technographic adjacency. Intent score: 0.76.
In-ICP prospect with fresh enrichment and former Harvey champion now in-seat. Intent score: 0.84.

data.resultSummary: Welcome-back email sent (champion now at new account)

data.reason: Prompt v2 rerun after new funding and champion-movement signals replaced the earlier low-confidence classification.
Tightened to post-Series-B; closed-lost analysis showed pre-revenue startups don't convert.
Added explicit bottoms-up spend estimation step.
